message:
chore(beads): close franken_numpy-5hef and franken_numpy-7qp9

Closes the two [MOCK] audit followups delivered by commit 0761a2d:
- 5hef: einsum split_once .unwrap() → .expect() with invariant message
- 7qp9: 42 fnp-conformance fixture .unwrap() → .expect() with context

Both beads were purely diagnostic improvements (no semantic change);
build verified via rch cargo check -p fnp-ufunc -p fnp-conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
